items.title: Therapy? Who needs it when you can update a 2026-27 Pacers cap sheet and delete rows for Garrison Mathews, Tony Braldey, Jeremiah Robinson-Earl, Cody Martin, James Wiseman, Gabe McGlothan, Monte Morris, and Mac McClung.
